schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: FDA approval + condition list + testimonials + free treatment offer

headline.vsl_adaptation: If you've been suffering from spinal stenosis, I have incredible news. A new FDA-approved treatment is now available that may eliminate or dramatically reduce your pain - without surgery, without injections, and without painful treatments...

lead.opening_verbatim: The Class IV laser, approved by the FDA in 2006, packs a punch while remaining non-invasive. The Class IV laser is capable of reaching depths of 6 to 9 inches, with a treatment beam of up to 3 inches.
lead.transition_to_body: Because the Class IV laser reaches deep into the tissues, it is ideal for treating...

mechanism.mechanism_description: Class IV laser delivers deep, penetrating photonic (light) energy to depths of 6-9 inches. This triggers photobiostimulation: increased ATP production, reduced inflammation and pain, increased circulation at pain site. Changes cellular chemistry to create true healing, not just symptom masking. Treatment times of 5-15 minutes.

proof_elements.verbatim: The Class IV laser, approved by the FDA in 2006
capable of reaching depths of 6 to 9 inches, with a treatment beam of up to 3 inches
my pain level went from a constant 8 to a 5 in just one treatment
treatment times of as little as 5 to 15 minutes

key_sections.content_verbatim: Because the Class IV laser reaches deep into the tissues, it is ideal for treating sprains and strains, arthritis, calcified muscles and fibrotic adhesions, as well as intra-articular tissues inside of the joints. With treatment times of as little as 5 to 15 minutes, the Class IV laser allows many conditions to vastly improve within a few visits.

Deep Tissue Laser Treatment delivers, deep, penetrating, photonic (light) energy to bring about profound physiological changes. ATP (Adenosine-triphosphate) production is increased, inflammation and pain reduced and circulation increased at the site of pain. These changes in cellular chemistry are triggered by the deep tissue laser making it a true healing modality.

benefits_list: Development of muscle tissue and collagen
Reduction of inflammation, swelling and scar tissue formation

testimonials.quote: Dr. Digrado's laser treatment has had terrific results on my neck injuries due to a head on collision last February... Six months later I was back to 80% mobility and am relatively pain free. Results are INCREDIBLE! Now I feel 100% better due to the laser treatments.

For about 8 years I have had sciatic and low back pain that goes down my leg... I was amazed of how my pain level went from a constant 8 to a 5 in just one treatment. No surgery, no drugs and after a series of treatments I'm now pain free!
